features: ODOUR NEUTRALISER : With x2 Odour Neutralisation technology for a light natural scent that tackles pet odours and banishes bathroom and kitchen smells
PACKAGING : Packaged in 100% recycled plastic bottle (236ml)
NATURAL ESSENTIAL OILS : Discover Air Wick Active Fresh air freshener room spray infused with natural essential oils
JASMINE FRAGRANCE :Fill your home with a true to nature experience of wild jasmine and frangipani flowers blended with a warmth of spiced cinnamon
NATURALITY : Air Wick air freshener spray is free from propellants, dyes and pthalates
description: Product Description With its new formula with no added water, Air Wick Pure neutralises odours with no water fall down and diffuses a fresh a wonderful fragrance in your home. Enhance your home with the playful fragrance of Jasmine, evoking the hope and joy brought by a rejuvenating nature. Ingredients ALCOHOL
